The Dialtones European Co-Bill Band Prospects

1,100 opening-slot and co-bill prospects across the 11 selected countries.

Research status: This first version uses public MusicBrainz artist metadata to seed 100 candidate acts per country. I did not invent manager names, private emails, exact 18-month venue histories, or article links. Yellow manager/contact fields are intentionally marked as needing verification, with direct public-search links for each act.

CSV export: dialtones-europe-cobill-band-prospects.csv

United Kingdom: 100Ireland: 100Netherlands: 100Belgium: 100Germany: 100France: 100Spain: 100Portugal: 100Denmark: 100Sweden: 100Italy: 100
